title: IT Assistant (Contract)
description:
The IT Assistant provides essential hardware and software support, troubleshoots system and application issues, and assists with API and database-related tasks. This role ensures smooth internal operations by maintaining system stability, supporting integrations, and helping resolve technical faults efficiently. The position requires strong problem-solving skills, adaptability, and a proactive attitude in handling day-to-day IT needs.

Key Responsibilities 

· Strong understanding of APIs (RESTful services, JSON, XML, authentication methods such as OAuth, API keys)

· Solid hardware knowledge (PCs, laptops, networking basics)

· Strong software knowledge (Windows, databases, applications, system tools, installation)

· Experience troubleshooting system, application, and integration issues

· Ability to read and understand technical documentation

· Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

· Any other ad-hoc responsibilities assigned

Requirements

· Diploma in IT, Computer Science, or equivalent.

· Possess strong troubleshooting and good problem-solving IT skills in relation to diagnosing and solving both technical hardware/software faults.

· Preferably with work knowledge on SAP B1 SDK or C# web database programming

· Work Knowledge on MS SQL and MySQL (Stored procedure)

Preferred Skills

· 1 year of relevant experience preferred.

· Experience with SAP Business One specifically Service Layer

· Knowledge of ERP system integrations

· Experience with scripting or programming (e.g., Python, JavaScript)

· Familiarity with databases (SQL Server, or similar)

· Experience with cloud services or integration platforms

· Good Interpersonal relationships and observing discretion for sensitive data and information

· Ability to communicate at all levels

· Good analytical and problem-solving skills

· Adaptability and flexibility

· Highly motivated and hardworking with positive attitude

postedCompany.description:
At Sapphire Windows, we believe every home is unique and we go out of our way to craft Window and Door Systems to make your home safer, more secure and beautiful.  


The story of Sapphire Windows began in 1989 when our founder, Jeffrey Liew, noticed the exceptional build quality of the windows in Europe while studying abroad. He decided from that experience that he would design his own home with windows that provided the same security, heat and sound insulation. That decision led him to partner with world-leading uPVC maker, Deceuninck who supplied him with a window system that exceeded all his expectations. This sparked the vision in him of bettering the lives of every future homeowner.  


Today, Sapphire Windows is a leading window and door system specialist, renowned for its quality, workmanship and customer service. Driven by the company’s motto “Do it Right, Do it Proud”, we offer both innovative and timeless design solutions for every home.
postedCompany.name: SAPPHIRE WINDOWS PTE. LTD.
